title: agent-fleet fleet.yaml
description: Fleet configuration — shared egress-presets and agent list

name.description: Fleet name (used for Docker network/project naming)

agents.description: List of agent names — each must have a matching agents/<name>/agent.yaml

egress-presets.description: Named, reusable sets of egress rules. Agents reference these by name.

egress-preset.description: Ordered list of egress rules. First match wins.

egress-rule.description: A single egress rule. Must have at least one matcher (host or endpoint).

host.description: Domain patterns to match. Use ["*"] for catch-all.

endpoint.description: Full URL patterns to match (for MCP endpoints).

provider.description: Provider path — handles credential injection/rewriting. Optional for passthrough rules.

options.description: Provider-specific options. Validated by the provider's own schema.json.
